headline: Microsoft CEO adds fuel to Palantir CEO’s AI warning
summary: It turns out that Palantir (PLTR) CEO Alex Karp’s thunderous warning about the AI industry wasn’t a one-off rant. Over the past couple of years, the word "AI" has become like a broken record, heard at least once almost every day, often followed by a wave of anxiety. What has happened amid all the ...

headline: ADBE, CRM, NOW, MSFT: Software Stocks Fall After IBM Warns Clients Shifting Spending To Servers, Cybersecurity

headline: Kognitos Named Sample Vendor in Two Gartner® Hype Cycles as Enterprise AI Shifts from Prompts to Governed Execution
summary: Dual inclusion in Gartner® Hype Cycle™ publications reflects enterprise demand for AI that is traceable, governed, and built to scaleSAN JOSE, Calif., July 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Kognitos, the pioneer of neurosymbolic AI for business automation, today announced it has been named a Sample Vendor in the Context Graphs innovation profile in two Gartner® Hype Cycle™ publications: the Hype Cycle for Agentic AI, 2026 and the Hype Cycle for Data Science and Machine Learning, 2026. headline: Morgan Stanley Drops a $50 Billion Bombshell — Can Big Tech Still Afford to Build the AI Factories of the Future?
summary: Morgan Stanley just revised what it costs to build a frontier AI cluster, and the new numbers are reshaping which companies can actually compete in the AI arms race. The financial gap between winners and everyone else is widening faster than Wall Street anticipated.

headline: TappAlpha Expands Growth + Income ETF Platform with TMGN, Bringing Tax-Efficient Income to the Cboe Magnificent 10 Index
summary: SEATTLE, July 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Following its recent milestone of surpassing $500 million in assets under management, TappAlpha today announced the launch of the TappAlpha Cboe Magnificent 10 Growth & Daily Income ETF (TMGN), a new ETF designed to provide exposure to the Cboe Magnificent 10 Index (MGTN Index) while applying TappAlpha's daily options-based growth + income strategy. TMGN, listed on Cboe BZX Equities Exchange, expands TappAlpha's growing Growth + Income ETF lineup, which

headline: Oracle shares gain after report it leads race for Japanese government cloud contract (ORCL)
summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) shares moved higher in premarket trading on Monday after a report suggested the company is leading the competition to provide cloud infrastructure services to the Japanese government. Oracle reportedly ahead in bidding processAccording to a Financial Times report citing seven people familiar with the discussions, Oracle is currently ahead of Amazon Web Services, Microsoft and Google in negotiations over the potential contract.

content.title: Oracle shares gain after report it leads race for Japanese government cloud contract (ORCL)
content.summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) shares moved higher in premarket trading on Monday after a report suggested the company is leading the competition to provide cloud infrastructure services to the Japanese government. Oracle reportedly ahead in bidding processAccording to a Financial Times report citing seven people familiar with the discussions, Oracle is currently ahead of Amazon Web Services, Microsoft and Google in negotiations over the potential contract.
